content.scenarioHint: 旅客患有糖尿病，想了解是否需要申报以及是否会影响保险覆盖范围

options.text: I have diabetes — does that mean I can't get travel insurance?
I'm diabetic, but my condition is well-controlled. Should I mention it when applying for insurance?
Can you give me a discount because I have a chronic illness?
Do you cover all medical emergencies, even if I didn't tell you about my illness?

content.explanation: 正确答案正确体现了主动披露病史并询问申报必要性的恰当表达，符合避免理赔纠纷的学习目标。选项1语气过于绝对，容易造成误解；选项3错误地将健康状况与折扣挂钩，偏离主题；选项4假设未申报的情况，不符合主动沟通的语境。

options.text: No, diabetics are always excluded from coverage.
It depends on your control and medication — we can assess your case.
Just buy the cheapest plan and hope nothing happens.
You need to cancel your trip if you have any chronic illness.

content.explanation: 正确答案强调根据病情控制和用药情况评估，符合保险行业对慢性病的处理原则。选项1过于绝对，不符合实际；选项3是危险建议；选项4错误地将慢性病与旅行取消挂钩。
content.speakerText: I’ve been diabetic for 10 years. Can I still get travel insurance?
content.speakerTextCn: 我患有糖尿病已10年，还能买旅行保险吗？
